creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
the solution:

Please add audio/gstreamer-plugins-vorbis to the run-dependency 

There is now: devel/gstreamer-plugins-gio,
audio/gstreamer-plugins-ogg, audio/gstreamer-plugins-mp3,
audio/gstreamer-plugins-flac, etc........ but the player needs also
gstreamer-plugins-vorbis.
